name: Kevin Zhang
currentRole: Corporate Vice President of Business Development
connectionToCompany: Leads business development for key foundry customers including NVIDIA, overseeing advanced node engagements for GPU and AI accelerator production at TSMC
sourceNote: Publicly named in TSMC press releases and technology symposium materials as VP of Business Development interfacing with major fabless customers

name: Cliff Hou
currentRole: Senior Vice President of Research & Development
connectionToCompany: Oversees process node development including N4 and N3 technologies used in NVIDIA GPU production; TSMC R&D roadmap directly enables NVIDIA next-generation chip architectures
sourceNote: Named in TSMC annual reports and technology symposium presentations as head of R&D organization

name: Y.J. Mii
currentRole: Senior Vice President of Research & Development (Emeritus/Former)
formerRole: Vice President of Research & Development at TSMC
connectionToCompany: Led TSMC R&D during critical period when NVIDIA transitioned to leading-edge FinFET nodes; foundational process work underpins NVIDIA Pascal through Ampere GPU generations
sourceNote: Cited in TSMC technology publications and industry conference proceedings as long-tenured R&D leader

name: Burn J. Lin
currentRole: Vice President of Patterning Technology (Retired/Former Fellow)
formerRole: TSMC Fellow and Vice President of Patterning Technology
connectionToCompany: Pioneered EUV and multi-patterning lithography techniques at TSMC that are critical for manufacturing NVIDIA advanced node GPUs at high yield
sourceNote: Named in IEEE publications, SPIE conference papers, and TSMC technical disclosures as VP-level patterning expert

name: Douglas Yu
currentRole: Vice President of Integrated Interconnect and Packaging
connectionToCompany: Leads TSMC CoWoS and SoIC advanced packaging programs directly utilized by NVIDIA for H100 and A100 GPU packaging, enabling high-bandwidth memory integration critical to NVIDIA AI accelerator products
sourceNote: Named in TSMC OIP ecosystem presentations, IEEE IEDM papers, and industry packaging conference keynotes as VP of Integrated Interconnect and Packaging
